subcodes.first_line: O Abu’l-Ḥasan! God willing thou art sustained by His lordly favours and art occupied with such deeds as befit His Day... Regard thou faith as a tree. Its fruits, leaves, boughs and branches are, and have ever been, trustworthiness, truthfulness, uprightness and forbearance
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالحسن انشاء الله بعنایت مخصوصه حق فائز باشی و بما ینبغی لایام الله عامل
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @law of Huququ'llah, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
